problem: Why do perovskite solar cells degrade — what material instability causes it?
hypothesis: The key to Why do perovskite solar cells degrade — what material instability causes it? is Liquid crystal elastomer actuation — specifically Liquid crystal elastomer — which would help 3,000,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Accelerated degradation study with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
